title: Add comments to board and not task
excerpt: When I create a new board, I want to tag my coworker and tell him what it’s used for. Currently I can only add comments inside specific board rows. I’d love to be able to just add a comment to the board title or somewher…

posts.author: ITU (Deryn)
posts.cookedHtml: When I create a new board, I want to tag my coworker and tell him what it’s used for. Currently I can only add comments inside specific board rows. I’d love to be able to just add a comment to the board title or somewhere generally so we can discuss things within the board.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is already in the works:

New feature in development: Board discussions! New Features
New EPIC feature in development INTRODUCING, BOARD DISCUSSIONS: Very soon, users will be able to communicate within the context of an entire board - a dedicated space for discussion beyond items in your board! This long-standing community feature request finally addresses the limitations of having to host board-level conversations within specific items, disrupting the board structure and flow of work. Board discussions will adopt the same functionality as the…
